purpose: Define a reusable role/persona/scope taxonomy for CXOrbia Phase A so operational roles such as representatives, coordinators, franchise owners, client users, finance, certification, shoppers and SaaS admins are represented without hardcoding a specific tenant.
designRule: Do not put every operational title as a heavy Firebase custom claim. Keep claims small. Use role, personaType, scope, tenantId, countryIds/projectIds, permissionsVersion and optional shopperId/clientId/staffId. Resolve detailed permissions from protected config after Auth is active.

platformAdmin.notes: SaaS/CXOrbia internal operator. Reserved for platform-level operations and not required for day-one tenant operations.

tenantOwner.notes: Tenant principal or account owner. Can manage tenant configuration, projects, users, reviewQueue and audit view.

franchiseOwner.notes: Franchise/franquiciado or franchise operator. Can manage tenant/project configuration within assigned countries/projects.

countryRepresentative.notes: Representative by country or territory. Can coordinate multiple projects in assigned countries without platform-wide access.

operationsCoordinator.notes: Coordinator for field operations, visits, assignments, reprogramming, cancellations, HR/source follow-up and reviewQueue.

projectCoordinator.notes: Project-level coordinator. Similar to operationsCoordinator but limited to configured projectIds.

fieldRepresentative.notes: Field representative or local operations representative. May prepare assignments, review operational status and support shoppers.

financeOperator.notes: Finance/liquidations role. Can view calculated liquidations and payment states with audit, without raw bank data by default.

certificationOperator.notes: Manages question banks, certification attempts, carryovers and human review of AI-generated drafts.

clientBrandAdmin.notes: Evaluated brand/client user with project reporting, results and limited configuration where enabled.

clientBrandViewer.notes: Read-only client/brand viewer for approved reports and project summaries.

shopperEvaluator.notes: Shopper/evaluator. Can access own profile, visits, certifications and benefits only.

supportOperator.notes: Support/helpdesk role for future controlled operations. Not Phase A default.

scopeModel.platform: All tenants. Reserved; not Phase A default.
scopeModel.tenantProjectOrCountry: Project-level operations filtered by projectIds and/or countryIds.
scopeModel.ownTenantOrProject: Only own shopper/client profile and assigned project data.
scopeModel.tenantOrProjectSupport: Support scope with limited audited access. Future gate.
